name: davidwyly/rxn-orm
description: Lightweight ORM for PHP 8.1+: fluent SQL builder, PDO connection wrapper with nested transactions, hydrating active records with eager loading and casts. ~3k lines, zero runtime deps beyond ext-pdo.

suggest.illuminate/database: Install for the benchmark suite to compare against Eloquent
suggest.doctrine/orm: Install for the benchmark suite to compare against Doctrine ORM
